get.description: Get health information about the Synergy server.

modelReady.description: Whether at least one AI provider with a usable model is configured

post.description: Clean up and dispose all Synergy instances, releasing all resources.
Generate a Holos bind URL for browser-based login. Returns a URL to open in a popup.

get.description: Handles the redirect from Holos after user login. Exchanges the code for credentials.

post.description: Validate and save existing agent credentials. Validates by fetching a ws_token, then saves and reloads the Holos runtime.

delete.description: Remove stored Holos credentials and stop the Holos runtime. Used for sign-out.

post.description: Reload the Holos runtime connection. Useful when the WebSocket disconnects.

get.summary: List all agenda items across scopes
get.description: List all agenda items from every scope, sorted by creation time descending.

200.description: List of agenda items from all scopes

post.description: Trigger an agenda item via its webhook token. The request body is passed as the signal payload.

get.description: Get a list of scopes that have been opened with Synergy.
Retrieve the currently active scope that Synergy is working with.

patch.description: Update scope properties such as name, icon and color.

delete.description: Archive a scope. Archived scopes are hidden from the list but can be restored.

post.description: Initialize a git repository in the specified directory if one does not already exist.

initialized.description: Whether a new git repository was initialized

directory.description: Directory path to initialize git in

get.description: Get a list of all active pseudo-terminal (PTY) sessions managed by Synergy.

post.description: Create a new pseudo-terminal (PTY) session for running shell commands and processes.

put.description: Update properties of an existing pseudo-terminal (PTY) session.

delete.description: Remove and terminate a specific pseudo-terminal (PTY) session.

get.description: Establish a WebSocket connection to interact with a pseudo-terminal (PTY) session in real-time.
Retrieve the current Synergy configuration settings and preferences.

patch.description: Update Synergy configuration settings and preferences.

get.description: Retrieve only the active global Config Set raw configuration (without project or remote layers).
List all global Config Sets and indicate which one is active.

post.description: Create a new global Config Set, defaulting to a copy of the current active raw global config.

get.description: Read a global Config Set and its raw configuration.

patch.description: Patch a global Config Set raw configuration.

delete.description: Delete an inactive non-default global Config Set.

get.description: Read a global Config Set raw JSONC source and parsed preview.

put.description: Save raw JSONC for a global Config Set after validation and optionally reload runtime if active.

post.description: Validate raw JSONC for a global Config Set without saving it.
Activate a global Config Set and reload global runtime configuration.

get.description: Get a list of all configured AI providers and their default models.

post.description: Reload Synergy runtime subsystems after self-configuration changes.

get.description: Get a list of all available tool IDs, including both built-in tools and dynamically registered tools.
Get a list of available tools with their JSON schema parameters for a specific provider and model combination.

post.description: Clean up and dispose the current Synergy instance, releasing all resources.

get.description: Retrieve the current working directory and related path information for the Synergy instance.

post.description: Create a new git worktree for the current project.

get.description: List all sandbox worktrees for the current project.
Retrieve version control system (VCS) information for the current project, such as git branch.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter sessions updated on or after this timestamp (milliseconds since epoch)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Filter sessions updated before this timestamp (milliseconds since epoch)

parameters.name: parentOnly
parameters.description: Only include top-level sessions (exclude subsessions). Default: true

get.description: Get a paginated list of Synergy sessions, sorted by most recently updated.

post.description: Create a new Synergy session for interacting with AI assistants and managing conversations.

get.description: Retrieve the current status of all sessions, including active, idle, and completed states.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific Synergy session.

delete.description: Delete a session and permanently remove all associated data, including messages and history.

patch.description: Update properties of an existing session, such as title or other metadata.

get.description: Retrieve all child sessions that were forked from the specified parent session.
Retrieve the todo list associated with a specific session, showing tasks and action items.
Retrieve the task DAG associated with a specific session.

post.description: Analyze the current application and create an AGENTS.md file with project-specific agent configurations.
Create a new session by forking an existing session at a specific message point.
Abort an active session and stop any ongoing AI processing or command execution.
Generate a concise summary of the session using AI compaction to preserve key information.

get.description: Retrieve all messages in a session, including user prompts and AI responses.

post.description: Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.

tools.description: Per-prompt tool visibility toggle. Does not affect session permissions.

get.description: Get all file changes (diffs) made during this session.
Retrieve a specific message from a session by its message ID.

delete.description: Delete a part from a message

patch.description: Update a part in a message

post.description: Create and send a new message to a session asynchronously, starting the session if needed and returning immediately.

tools.description: Per-prompt tool visibility toggle. Does not affect session permissions.

post.description: Send a new command to a session for execution by the AI assistant.
Execute a shell command within the session context and return the AI's response.
Revert a specific message in a session, undoing its effects and restoring the previous state.
Restore all previously reverted messages in a session.
Approve or deny a permission request from the AI assistant.
Approve or deny a permission request from the AI assistant.
Enable or disable allow-all mode for a session. When enabled, all permission requests are automatically approved and any currently pending permissions are resolved.

get.description: Check if allow-all mode is enabled for a session.
Get all pending permission requests across all sessions.
Get all pending question requests across all sessions.

post.description: Provide answers to a question request from the AI assistant.

answers.description: User answers in order of questions (each answer is an array of selected labels)

post.description: Reject a question request from the AI assistant.

get.description: Estimate the size of a session export for a session and its subsessions.
Generate and download exported session data for a session and all its subsessions.
List all background tasks, optionally filtered by session
Get a specific background task by ID
Get the output of a completed background task

post.description: Cancel a running background task

get.description: Get a list of all available commands in the Synergy system.
Get a list of all available AI providers, including both available and connected ones.
Retrieve available authentication methods for all AI providers.

post.description: Initiate OAuth authorization for a specific AI provider to get an authorization URL.
Handle the OAuth callback from a provider after user authorization.

get.description: Get a list of all available skills in the Synergy system.

post.description: Reload all skills by rescanning skill directories.

delete.description: Delete a non-builtin skill by removing its directory from disk.

post.description: Import a skill from a .skill or .zip file. Extracts to the project or global skill directory.
Download a .zip file from a URL and import it as a skill.

get.description: Browse filesystem directories by path with optional fuzzy search. Returns absolute paths.
Search for text patterns across files in the project using ripgrep.
Search for files or directories by name or pattern in the project directory.
Search for workspace symbols like functions, classes, and variables using LSP.
List files and directories in a specified path.
Read the content of a specified file.
Get the git status of all files in the project.

200.description: Search results ranked by hybrid score

parameters.name: scopeID
parameters.description: Scope ID used by scope/session filters

parameters.name: sessionID
parameters.description: Session ID used by session filter

get.description: List experience records with server-side filtering, sorting, and pagination.
Get a specific experience record with its full content (script/raw).

delete.description: Delete a specific experience record permanently.

put.description: Apply an external reward to a specific experience. Use this to inject rewards from benchmark frameworks or custom evaluation pipelines. Provide either a direct composite reward value, or multi-dimensional reward scores.

get.description: List all experience records, optionally filtered by project ID.
Get statistics about the memory database including counts and file size.

post.description: Semantic search across active memories using embedding similarity. Requires embedding API to be configured.
Reset (delete) memory data by type. Supports resetting active memories, passive experiences, or both. Requires confirm=true to prevent accidental deletion.

scopeID.description: Only for experience: filter by scope ID

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm the reset operation

get.description: Get a specific active memory by ID.

delete.description: Delete a specific active memory permanently.

get.description: List all active (agent-curated) memories, optionally filtered by category.

parameters.name: scopeID
parameters.description: Limit activity to this scope (includes global items when provided)

parameters.description: Limit activity to a specific agenda item

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional case-insensitive text search across item, run, and session metadata

List the execution history for a specific agenda item.

Pause an active agenda item, suspending its triggers.
Mark an agenda item as done.
Cancel an agenda item, stopping all triggers and future executions.

get.description: Get a specific agenda item by ID.

delete.description: Delete an agenda item and all its run history permanently.

post.description: Create a new agenda item with optional triggers and execution configuration.

get.description: List all notes across all scopes, grouped by scope ID.
Export a note as Markdown or HTML.

get.description: Download a previously uploaded asset.

parameters.name: recompute
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to force a full recompute from scratch

get.description: Get the full stats snapshot. Returns cached snapshot if available, otherwise computes incrementally. Use ?recompute=true to force a full recompute from scratch.
Force a stats recompute and stream progress updates over SSE until the final snapshot is ready.

200.description: Server-sent events containing progress and final snapshot payloads

get.description: Check whether local Holos credentials exist without verifying them against the remote API. Returns existence, agent ID, and a masked secret.
Return a unified Holos state surface combining identity, connection, capability, entitlement, profile, contact, request, and presence data.
Check whether the stored agent credentials are still valid by attempting to fetch a ws_token from Holos.
Retrieve the current agent profile.

anchor.description: Unix timestamp (ms) to anchor the first tick

trigger.description: 'change': fire when output differs from previous; 'match': fire when output matches pattern

match.description: Regex pattern, required when trigger is 'match'

glob.description: File glob pattern to watch for changes, e.g. 'src/**/*.ts'

event.description: Specific file event to match. If omitted, triggers on any event

debounce.description: Debounce window before firing, e.g. '500ms', '2s'. Default: '500ms'

tool.description: Synergy tool name to call, e.g. 'inspire_jobs'

args.description: Arguments to pass to the tool

trigger.description: 'change': fire when tool output differs; 'match': fire when output matches pattern

match.description: Regex pattern, required when trigger is 'match'

token.description: Auto-generated secret token for the webhook URL

hint.description: Brief description of what this session contains

AgendaScope.description: Scope where the item was created

SessionEndpoint.description: Endpoint context if created from a session endpoint

sessionID.description: Session where the item was created

lastRunSessionID.description: Session ID of the most recent execution

persistentSessionID.description: Reused session ID for persistent session mode

consecutiveErrors.description: Consecutive error count, reset on success

global.description: If true, item is visible from all scopes

prompt.description: Instruction for the agent when triggered

agent.description: Agent to use, defaults to configured default

sessionRefs.description: Sessions whose content may be relevant — injected as context references

wake.description: Whether to wake the origin session's agent on completion

silent.description: Whether to suppress result delivery entirely

messages_page_up.description: Scroll messages up by one page

messages_page_down.description: Scroll messages down by one page

messages_half_page_up.description: Scroll messages up by half page

messages_half_page_down.description: Scroll messages down by half page

messages_toggle_conceal.description: Toggle code block concealment in messages

input_line_home.description: Move to start of line in input

input_line_end.description: Move to end of line in input

input_select_line_home.description: Select to start of line in input

input_select_line_end.description: Select to end of line in input

input_visual_line_home.description: Move to start of visual line in input

input_visual_line_end.description: Move to end of visual line in input

input_select_visual_line_home.description: Select to start of visual line in input

input_select_visual_line_end.description: Select to end of visual line in input

input_buffer_home.description: Move to start of buffer in input

input_buffer_end.description: Move to end of buffer in input

input_select_buffer_home.description: Select to start of buffer in input

input_select_buffer_end.description: Select to end of buffer in input

input_delete_to_line_end.description: Delete to end of line in input

input_delete_to_line_start.description: Delete to start of line in input

ServerConfig.description: Server configuration for synergy serve and web commands

cors.description: Additional domains to allow for CORS

description.description: Description of when to use the agent

hidden.description: Hide this subagent from the @ autocomplete menu (default: false, only applies to mode: subagent)

color.description: Hex color code for the agent (e.g., #FF5733)

steps.description: Maximum number of agentic iterations before forcing text-only response

path.description: Override path to the external agent binary

model.description: Default model for this external agent

auto_discover.description: Whether to auto-discover this agent on startup (default: true)

disabled.description: Disable this variant for the model

enterpriseUrl.description: GitHub Enterprise URL for copilot authentication

setCacheKey.description: Enable promptCacheKey for this provider (default false)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to this provider. Default is 300000 (5 minutes). Set to false to disable timeout.

anyOf.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to this provider. Default is 300000 (5 minutes). Set to false to disable timeout.
Disable timeout for this provider entirely.

simThreshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity for retrieval candidates (default: 0.7)

wSim.description: Weight for similarity in hybrid score (default: 0.5)

wQ.description: Weight for Q-value in hybrid score (default: 0.5)

explorationConstant.description: UCB1 exploration constant — scales √(ln(N)/n) visit-decay bonus (default: 0.5)

LearningConfig.description: Hyperparameters for the experience learning pipeline

qInit.description: Optimistic Q-value initialization per reward dimension (default: 1.0)

dedupIntentThreshold.description: Intent cosine similarity threshold for deduplicating experiences (default: 0.85)

dedupScriptThreshold.description: Script cosine similarity threshold for deduplicating experiences (default: 0.8)

qHistorySize.description: Maximum Q-value history entries per experience (default: 50)

snapThreshold.description: Threshold for snapping reward dimensions to discrete {-1, 0, 1} (default: 0.5)

legacyRewardConfidence.description: Default confidence for legacy scalar reward format (default: 0.3)

encoderRetries.description: LLM retry count for intent/script/reward generation (default: 3)

digestToolOutputBudget.description: Max estimated tokens for tool output in turn digest (default: 800)

encoderToolFieldBudget.description: Max chars per tool input field in encoder context (default: 500)

encoderToolOutputBudget.description: Max chars for tool output in encoder context (default: 300)

rewardWeights.description: Weights for multi-dimensional reward composition (default: outcome=0.35, intent=0.25, execution=0.2, orchestration=0.1, expression=0.1)

rewardDelay.description: Number of subsequent turns to wait before evaluating reward (default: 2)

encode.description: Learn from conversations — extract intent, reward, and scripts (default: true)

retrieve.description: Inject relevant past experiences into new conversations (default: true)
Auto-inject relevant memories into new conversations (default: true)

topK.description: Default maximum entries per category to contextually retrieve (default: 3)

memoryDedupThreshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold for blocking duplicate memory writes (default: 0.75)

active.description: Agent-initiated active memory curation via memory tools (default: true)

IdentityConfig.description: Identity configuration for embedding and evolution

embedding.description: Embedding model configuration for memory and retrieval

baseURL.description: Base URL for the embedding API

apiKey.description: API key for the embedding service

rerank.description: Rerank model configuration for memory retrieval refinement

baseURL.description: Base URL for the rerank API

apiKey.description: API key for the rerank service (falls back to embedding.apiKey)

evolution.description: Dual-mode evolution system: passive experience learning + active memory curation (default: true)

autonomy.description: Enable autonomous background routines like anima daily wake (default: true)

command.description: Command and arguments to run the MCP server

environment.description: Environment variables to set when running the MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

timeout.description: Timeout in ms for fetching tools from the MCP server. Defaults to 5000 (5 seconds) if not specified.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID. If not provided, dynamic client registration (RFC 7591) will be attempted.

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret (if required by the authorization server)

scope.description: OAuth scopes to request during authorization

url.description: URL of the remote MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

headers.description: Headers to send with the request

oauth.description: OAuth authentication configuration for the MCP server. Set to false to disable OAuth auto-detection.

timeout.description: Timeout in ms for fetching tools from the MCP server. Defaults to 5000 (5 seconds) if not specified.

domain.description: Feishu domain (feishu for China, lark for international)

botOpenId.description: Bot open_id used to verify real @mentions in group chats

streamingThrottleMs.description: Minimum interval between streaming card updates in ms

groupSessionScope.description: Session scoping strategy for group chats

inboundDebounceMs.description: Debounce rapid-fire messages from the same sender in the same chat (0 = disabled)

resolveSenderNames.description: Resolve sender display names via Feishu contact API

replyInThread.description: Reply in thread when message is part of a topic

streaming.description: Default streaming setting for all accounts

portalUrl.description: Holos portal URL for browser-facing pages (bind/start)

EmailSmtpConfig.description: SMTP transport settings for outgoing emails

secure.description: Use TLS/SSL for the SMTP connection
Use TLS/SSL for the IMAP connection

model.description: Model to use for this category (e.g., 'sii-openai/GPT-5.2')

promptAppend.description: Additional prompt context to inject for this category

description.description: Description of when to use this category

$schema.description: JSON schema reference for configuration validation

theme.description: Theme name to use for the interface

autoupdate.description: Automatically update to the latest version. Set to true to auto-update, false to disable, or 'notify' to show update notifications

disabled_providers.description: Disable providers that are loaded automatically

enabled_providers.description: When set, ONLY these providers will be enabled. All other providers will be ignored

model.description: Default model in the format of provider/model, eg anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5

nano_model.description: Cheapest model for trivial extraction tasks like title generation, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to mini_model → mid_model → model.

mini_model.description: Lightweight model for simple tasks like intent extraction, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to mid_model → model.

mid_model.description: Mid-tier model for internal agents that need moderate reasoning (script extraction, reward evaluation, code exploration), in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model.

thinking_model.description: Deep thinking model for complex reasoning and architecture tasks, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

long_context_model.description: Model with extra-large context window for processing very long inputs, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

creative_model.description: Model for creative and visual tasks (UI design, writing, artistry), in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

holos_friend_reply_model.description: Model for Holos automatic friend replies, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

vision_model.description: Model for vision tasks (image/PDF/video analysis), in the format of provider/model. Required for the look_at tool to work. If not set, vision capabilities are disabled.

default_agent.description: Default agent to use when none is specified. Must be a primary agent. Falls back to 'synergy' if not set or if the specified agent is invalid.

username.description: Custom username to display in conversations instead of system username

provider.description: Custom provider configurations and model overrides

channel.description: Channel configurations for messaging platform integrations

instructions.description: Additional instruction files or patterns to include

url.description: Agora API base URL (defaults to https://agora.holosai.io)

tokenUrl.description: Holos API URL for Agora token exchange (defaults to https://www.holosai.io)

giteaSSHHost.description: Override SSH hostname used for Agora's Gitea remote

timeout.description: Seconds before unanswered questions auto-expire (0 = no timeout, default 1800 = 30min)

auto.description: Enable automatic compaction when context is full (default: true)

prune.description: Enable pruning of old tool outputs (default: true)

overflowThreshold.description: Fraction of usable context that triggers auto-compaction (default: 0.85)

openTelemetry.description: Enable OpenTelemetry spans for AI SDK calls (using the 'experimental_telemetry' flag)

primary_tools.description: Tools that should only be available to primary agents.

continue_loop_on_deny.description: Continue the agent loop when a tool call is denied

mcp_timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for model context protocol (MCP) requests

pluginConfig.description: Per-plugin configuration namespaces. Keys are plugin IDs, values are plugin-specific config.

category.description: Custom category configurations for background tasks. Categories define model and prompt presets.

source.description: Why this interaction mode applies, e.g. 'agenda' or 'channel:feishu'

status.description: Current status of the task: pending, in_progress, completed, cancelled

priority.description: Priority level of the task: high, medium, low

id.description: Unique identifier for the todo item

status.description: Current status: pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled

deps.description: IDs of nodes this depends on. Empty array for root nodes

assign.description: Suggested executor: self, master, explore, scout, scholar, scribe, advisor

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when this question was asked

MemoryCategory.description: Filter by a single memory category

MemoryRecallMode.description: Filter by a single recall mode

scopeID.description: Scope that owns the agenda item

sessionID.description: Session where the item was created

autoReply.description: Allow the agent to automatically reply to messages from this contact

autoInitiate.description: Allow the agent to proactively send messages to this contact

blocked.description: Block all messages from this contact

maxAutoTurns.description: Maximum consecutive auto-replies without human intervention

direction.description: Whether this request was sent or received

peerId.description: Holos ID of the other party

peerName.description: Display name of the other party

peerBio.description: Short bio of the other party
